string 2:
This is where we came out before... It doesn't look all that
different. I just hope everywhere else is the same.
I can hardly believe it's been eight whole years.

We need to check on the occupied villages and see if we
can negotiate with the Titans.

And we gotta find that Digimon healer! Going to the town's
tavern to gather information is probably our best bet.

Yeah. I sure hope we can talk things out... Hurting each other
like this won't make anyone happy.
Is this... really Central Town? Are these all... Titans...?
This town really has changed...

Looks pretty much the same as the rest of town... Think any
of these Titans will hear us out?
Let's try and do what we can!
Just talking to one almost turned into a fight...
What do we do...?

Hello, there! Nice to meet you. You appear to be new faces
around these parts.
Where are you from?
Huh?
Oh, come, now! No need to be so surprised. I'm Lanamon.

And since I'm drinking all by my lonesome today... I was
looking for someone to talk to.
U-Um, we're...
I see...

So, you're looking to negotiate... and you're in search of a
certain Digimon, are you?
Do you think the land the Titans conquered can be reclaimed?{next}
Who can we negotiate with to end the fighting?{next}
Is it really impossible to talk things out...?{next}

Well, you can hardly expect me to have answers right off the
top of my head.
But... I suppose I can offer you a bit of help.
R-Really?!

You see, not all Titans are fond of this prickly atmosphere
we have going on right now.

Some of them simply want to enjoy their lives. Like... well,
me, for example.

If I can fill my days with fun chats like this one right
now, that's enough for me.
So not all Titans are the same...

Why would we be? You know, the more we talk, I'm beginning
to realize...
...that you folks don't know nearly enough about Titans.

Getting the Titans to relinquish the territory they've
seized won't be easy.

Such things may not hold any interest for me, but my
fellow Titans must've had their reasons for attacking.

I suggest you take a little tour of the Digital World to see
more of its current state.
A tour, huh...? Maybe the Locomon Railroad would—

Unfortunately, the railroad isn't running now. See? It's
like I said. There's so much you don't know.

The Factorial Area that powers the railroad has undergone a...
drastic makeover, you see.
O-Oh...

If you're seeking a means of transportation, I can introduce
you to a friend of mine. They might be able to help.

I spoke with MasterBlimpmon, and he has agreed to
transport you.
Thank you! But... why are you helping us so much?
I can't say this too loudly, but the truth is...

...I'm gathering what could be called the more moderate 
Digimon among the Titans.

Remember, more than a few Titans wish to see an end to
this conflict, too.
I had no idea... Hearing that makes me feel kind of happy.

Personally, I couldn't care less about controlling territory...
So I hope your negotiations go well!
Wow. I didn't think any Digimon like Lanamon existed.

Lanamon's right, you know. We have to learn more about
the way the Digital World is now!

Oh, that's right! Didn't you say you were looking for a certain 
Digimon that's a skilled healer?

If I had to guess... I'd say you might be able to find such
a healer in a village by the sea.

It just so happens I have some important business to do
there, so how about we go together?
...Thanks!
Like I said, there are moderates among the Titans, too.
All right, then. Shall we be off?
